hypotheses.name: kNN Connected Components Biological Enrichment at L11
hypotheses.method: k=10 kNN graph on 209 named gene embeddings at L8–L11. scipy.sparse.csgraph.connected_components identifies 2 components. Fisher exact test for immune gene family enrichment in Component 1 (n=14) vs Component 0 (n=195). Mann-Whitney for STRING degree difference.
hypotheses.result_value: AP1 enrichment in comp1 (n=14): OR=0.06, p=0.023. Comp1 genes: FOS, JUNB, TNF, PTGS2, HLA-A, HLA-DPB1, KLF6, LDHA, LGALS1, NCAM1, NCOA3, NR4A3, PAX5, TBXAS1. Stable at L8–L11.
hypotheses.next_action: GO enrichment for 14 diverging genes; test cross-model consistency with Geneformer; bootstrap cluster stability

hypotheses.name: Gene Trajectory Clustering by Distance-to-Centroid Profile
hypotheses.method: Compute 209-gene x 12-layer distance-to-centroid matrix. Z-score normalize per gene. k-means (k=2..6), silhouette selection. k=2 yields silhouette=0.905. Two clusters: converging (n=195, slope=-0.507) and diverging (n=14, slope=+0.459).
hypotheses.result_value: silhouette=0.905 at k=2; converging cluster: dist L0=11.4→L11=4.1; diverging cluster: dist L0=16.6→L11=20.3; Kruskal-Wallis (degree) p=0.352 (not significant); 2-cluster solution matches kNN components exactly
hypotheses.next_action: GO enrichment for diverging 14 genes; bootstrap CI; characterize L11 converging manifold dimensionality

hypotheses.name: Spectral Gap k-Robustness Sweep (k=5–30)
hypotheses.method: For k in {5,10,15,20,25,30}: build kNN graph on 209 named genes per layer. Normalized Laplacian Fiedler value (spectral gap) per layer. Spearman rho(layer, gap). Null: 50 random Gaussian runs per k (same n=209, d=512).
hypotheses.result_value: rho mean=-0.988 [range -1.000 to -0.951], all k negative, all null_p=0.000. Full table: k5 rho=-0.993, k10 rho=-1.000, k15 rho=-0.951, k20 rho=-0.986, k25 rho=-1.000, k30 rho=-1.000.
hypotheses.next_action: Spectral gap finding is now fully confirmed. Proceed to interpret in context of manifold collapse / near-1D structure at deep layers.
